name: X12-837 Claim Processing
summary: 837 claim-processing strategy with ephemeral stage-1 and unified cn[] output.
description: Parse X12 837 to ephemeral structure (not persisted by default), map to Claim ContextObject, flatten to cn[] (same shape as openEHR) for unified querying.

strategy.description: Single collection config with optional stage-1 persistence

benefits: Unified cn[] format enables cross-domain queries
Same cn[] shape as openEHR for unified queries
constraints: Stage-1 not persisted by default (enable via transform.debug.persistStage1)
Requires CO mapping rules per transaction type
pick_when: Want unified query model across X12 and openEHR
avoid_when: Need lossless EDI preservation for compliance
